nasb.text: Elijah replied to them, “If I am a man of God, let fire come down from heaven and consume you and your fifty.” Then the fire of God came down from heaven and consumed him and his fifty.

esv.text: But Elijah answered them, “If I am a man of God, let fire come down from heaven and consume you and your fifty.” Then the fire of God came down from heaven and consumed him and his fifty.

cnv.text: 以利亞回答他們說：“如果我是神人，願火從天降下，把你和你的五十名手下吞滅。”於是　神的火從天降下，吞滅了五十夫長和他的五十名手下。

ccb.text: 以利亚说：“我若是上帝的仆人，愿火从天降下，烧死你和你的五十个部下。”上帝的火从天降下，烧死了五十夫长和他的五十个部下。
